message.content:
This is a mobile app interface screenshot with a clean, modern design. The background is a very light gray (almost white) with a subtle off-white card-based layout.

**Top Section:**
- A rounded rectangular white card with a subtle shadow, containing the main content
- At the top of this card, there's a header area with text and checkboxes
- Left side: Gray text "BAMBINO (CLICCA PER MODIFICARE)" in all caps, using a medium-weight sans-serif font, approximately 16px
- Right side: Three labels in gray text - "Presenza", "Pre", "Post" - each with a corresponding empty square checkbox below it
- The checkboxes are light gray outlines with white backgrounds, positioned directly under their respective labels
- Spacing between the header text and checkboxes is balanced, with good vertical and horizontal margins

**Bottom Section:**
- Below the header is a user profile area with a dark navy blue circular avatar containing white "SR" initials
- Next to the avatar: Black text "Sofia Rossi" in a bold sans-serif font, approximately 18px
- To the right of the name: Three interactive buttons in a row
- First button: Green square with rounded corners, white checkmark icon in the center
- Second button: Orange/amber rounded rectangle with white "PRE" text
- Third button: Blue rounded rectangle with white "POST" text
- All buttons have similar height and padding, with the green button being square while the others are slightly wider rectangles
- The buttons have a subtle shadow effect and appear to be tappable elements

**Overall Layout:**
- The card has generous padding (approximately 20px) on all sides
- Elements are well-spaced with consistent margins
- The color scheme uses grays, navy, green, orange, and blue for visual hierarchy
- The design is minimalistic with plenty of white space
- Text is left-aligned in the header and profile sections
- Buttons are right-aligned in the profile section

The interface appears to be part of a child management or attendance tracking application, with options to mark presence and pre/post status for a child named Sofia Rossi.
